case_title: SPECK CAB CO. INC. DBA ARROW CAB CO. VS MOY, PETER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO. INC. DBA ARROW CAB CO.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO. INC. DBA ARROW CAB CO.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,012.54 FILED BY MOY, PETER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SPECK CAB CO. INC. DBA ARROW CAB CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO. INC. DBA ARROW CAB CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOY, PETER PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO PROVE ITS CASE BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,147.71 FILED BY SPECK CAB CO. INC. DBA ARROW CAB CO. AS TO DEFENDANT MOY, PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOY, PETER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MOY, PETER RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SPECK CAB CO. INC. DBA ARROW CAB CO. $1,610.35 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,660.35, THE COURT DETERMINES CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S DAMAGES TO BE $2,012.94, AND ATTRIBUTES 20% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO CROSS-COMPLAINANT. THE JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
